basics.name: Feiyi Chen
basics.summary: Full-stack software developer with hands-on experience building web applications, backend workflows, REST API-based features, and data-driven systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, Java, SQL, React, Node.js, MongoDB, MySQL, Git, and Docker, with experience developing interactive applications, research data collection tools, and e-commerce platform workflows.

education.area: Master of Science in Computer Science

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Manoa, Honolulu, HI

highlights: Developed and integrated 3 interactive web-based games into an existing clinical research platform using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to support structured behavioral data collection.
Implemented real-time interaction logic to capture user responses and gameplay behavior for downstream research analysis.
Collaborated with researchers to refine frontend workflows, usability requirements, and data collection logic for developmental condition screening tools.
Improved maintainability of interactive research modules by organizing UI behavior, event handling, and data capture flows into reusable frontend patterns.
Collected, categorized, and documented Airbnb guest support requests involving WiFi connectivity, smart locks, TVs, printers, mobile devices, and in-room equipment issues.
Maintained structured customer issue logs to track issue categories, resolution status, escalation needs, and recurring technical patterns.
Analyzed recurring support records to identify common guest pain points and improve response efficiency for customer service workflows
Provided first-level troubleshooting for laptops, desktops, hardware peripherals, in-room WiFi, printers, mobile devices, and remote smart lock systems.
Maintained accurate inventory records for borrowed devices, replacement equipment, hardware repairs, and service documentation.
Designed and implemented reusable frontend page structures for a Print-on-Demand e-commerce platform, including help-center articles, sidebar navigation, and step-by-step product listing guides.
Built data-driven content layouts with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, allowing Amazon, Shopify, and WooCommerce tutorials to share a reusable page template.
Participated in designing product customization workflows that mapped user-uploaded 2D artwork onto footwear templates to generate final product preview images.
Organized product listing data, including SKU, product attributes, marketplace templates, and export-ready files, to support batch listing workflows for e-commerce sellers.
Applied responsive layout and user-centered design principles to improve readability, navigation, and seller onboarding across desktop and mobile devices.
